jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Vedanta - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Vedanta is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Vedanta:
Vedanta is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedanta!
